yesterdayStoryline.headline: France see off Morocco to reach semi-finals
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: Clinical defending and efficient finishing secured a 2-0 quarter-final win in Boston.

todayStoryline.headline: Spain and Belgium meet at SoFi Stadium
todayStoryline.subtitle: Contrasting styles clash in Los Angeles, kickoff 20:00 UK / 15:00 ET.

facts.home: Barcelona’s La Masia produced Spain greats Xavi and Iniesta, shaping modern national success.
facts.away: Belgium’s 'golden generation' finished third at the 2018 World Cup, their best ever.

news.headline: Tanker attacks near Strait of Hormuz disrupt shipping, raise energy concerns
news.body: Multiple commercial tankers were struck near the Strait of Hormuz, prompting maritime warnings and disruption to transit. The incidents have led to tightened US measures on Iranian oil sales and fresh diplomatic concern in the Gulf.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
